ready_for_verification_description: Ozali na ba-temwe {count} bandimami. AFROLOC na yo ekoki sik'oyo kondimama.
verification_options_description: Solola mu ma-metodu ma mingi ya kondima mu kondimisa kimvuala kya nge.
verify_process_step_1_desc: Bansakudya bole bakondima nzo na nge
verify_process_step_2_desc: Ma coordonnées ya GPS mendimami na bakonzi
verify_process_step_3_desc: AFROLOC na nge yekela kimvuala ya oficiale
verify_process_step_4_title: Etape 4: Kobongisa ya Masika na Masika
primary_residence_updated: Nzo na nge ya ntete yasemunwa mbote
primary_residence_info: Yoyo ye adresi na nge ya kya kuvalala na bakonzi
about_description: Kubongisa bisika ya numérique na Afrika na nzela ya teknoloji oyo ezali kosangisa bantu nyonso, kondimama ya communauté mpe géoréférencement ya malamu.
mission_text: Kupesa mwana-Afrika yonso adresse numérique ya ndenge mosi, oyo ekoki kondimama mpe oyo etikalaka, kolendisa bosangani ya mbongo, kokóma na misala ya ntina mpe kolendisa boyebani ya kontiná.
vision_text: Kokóma système ya adresse numérique ya kontiná oyo etalisamaka, kosangisa bantu ya Afrika koleka milliard 1 mpe kosala lokola infrastructure ya ntina mpo na bokoli ya libela na kontiná.
values_subtitle: Mibeko ya ntina oyo ezali kotambwisa mabongo nyonso mpe misala
value_inclusion_desc: Tondimi ete mwana-Afrika yonso asengeli na adresse numérique oyo ekoki kondimama, kozanga kotala esika to eloko ya économie na yandi.
value_security_desc: Tobateli boyebani mpe bosekrete ya basaleli na nzela ya kondimama ya communauté mpe chiffrement ya likolo.
value_community_desc: Système endimama na communauté yango moko, kondimisa bosolo mpe kolendisa masanga ya communauté.
value_interoperability_desc: Totongaka système ya kontiná oyo esalaka koleka mindelo, kosangisa Afrika mobimba.
journey_subtitle: Longwa na likanisi tii na bosolo ya kontiná
team_subtitle: Bantu ya mayele bapesami mpo na kobongola bisika ya numérique na Afrika
cta_about_description: Zala eteni ya mouvement oyo ezali kobongola bisika ya numérique na Afrika
timeline_conception_desc: Kubanda kobongisa likanisi ya adresse numérique ya kontiná mpo na Afrika
timeline_prototyping_desc: Kobongisa ndakisa ya yambu mpe komeka na ba communauté na Angola
timeline_community_validation_desc: Kutia système ya kondimama na ba témoins mpe ba nivo ya kondimama
timeline_regional_expansion_desc: Kubanda na bikolo ebele ya Afrika na lisungi ya minoko mingi
timeline_financial_integration_desc: Bosangani na ba institutions ya mbongo mpo na bosangani ya banque
timeline_public_api_desc: Kubanda API ya polele mpo na ba développeurs mpe ba entreprises
team_ceo_desc: PhD na Systèmes d'Information Géographique, bambula 15 ya boyebi na infrastructure numérique ya Afrika.
team_cto_desc: Ingénieur mokonzi ya kala ya Google Maps, spécialiste na géoréférencement mpe systèmes ya kukabwana.
team_community_desc: Atambwisaki ba projets ya bosangani numérique na bikolo 12 ya Afrika, ayebi minoko 6 ya Afrika.
team_engineering_desc: Architecte ya systèmes na boyebi na ba plateformes ya minene mpe blockchain.
admin_login_subtitle: Esika ya kubatama - kaka bantu oyo bapesami nzela
admin_security_notice: Porte oyo ya kukota ezali kaka mpo na ba administrateurs ya système. Mibondeli nyonso ya bokoti ekomami mpe etalelami.
access_denied_admin: Bokoti eboyami. Ndingisa ya mokambi esengeli.
welcome_admin: Boyei malamu na tableau de bord ya bokonzi
enter_6_digit_code: Svp kutia code ya ba chiffres 6
max_attempts_exceeded: Mibondeli ya likolo eleki. Senga code ya sika.
verify_phone_first: Svp kondima téléphone na nge yambu
passwords_do_not_match: Ba mot de passe ekokani te
too_many_attempts: Mibondeli mingi. Meka lisusu na sima.
download_app_subtitle: Baka système ya kuzaba bisika mbala mosi na téléphone na nge
contact_subtitle: Tuena mu Afrika yamvimba. Sola région na nge mpi bokila beto.
subject: Sujet
message_placeholder: Tungula demande to mutuna na nge...
faq_subtitle: Zua mavutu na mituna ya ntangu mingi mu AFROLOC
ios_important: Likambu ya ntina sambu na basaleli ya iPhone/iPad
ios_safari_required: Sambu na kutia appli yayi na iOS, ofweti kusadila navigateur Safari. Kana ozali kusadila navigateur nkaka (Chrome, Firefox, etc.), kangula lien yayi na Safari liboso.
scan_qr_code: Tanga Code QR na caméra ya téléphone na nge
qr_instructions: Talisa caméra ya téléphone na nge na code yina izali na zulu mpe landa malako sambu na kutia appli
ios_attention: KEBISA: Tala mbote nete ozali kusadila Safari
ios_step1: Kangula site yayi na Safari (navigateur ya ntete ya iPhone)
ios_step2: Fina bouton ya kokabola (icône ya carré na flèche ikeyi na zulu) na nse ya écran
ios_step3: Kita na menu mpe fina "Bakisa na Écran d'Accueil"
ios_step4: Fina "Bakisa" na coin ya zulu na diboko ya lubakala
ios_step5: Esilá! Icône ya appli ekotala na écran na nge ya kubanda
share_text: Tia appli ya AFROLOC na appareil na nge
install_directly: Tia mbala mosi na appareil na nge
android_step2: Fina menu (⋮) na coin ya zulu na diboko ya lubakala
android_step3: Sola "Tia appli" to "Bakisa na écran d'accueil"
use_smartphone: Sadila téléphone na nge sambu na expérience ileki mbote
to_install_mobile: Sambu na kutia appli na téléphone na nge:
scan_qr_above: To tanga Code QR yina izali na zulu na téléphone na nge
feature_offline_access: Kubaka bisika na nge kukondwa internet
pwa_no_store: Progressive Web App (PWA) - Ikele ve sambu na kokitisa na boutique ya appli
install_subtitle: Baka appli mbala mosi na écran na nge ya kubanda, isalaka kukondwa internet!
app_already_installed: AFROLOC itiami kala na appareil na nge
benefit_quick_access_desc: Banda mbala mosi na écran ya kubanda bonso appli ya mboka
benefit_offline_desc: Baka données na nge ata kukondwa internet
benefit_native_exp_desc: Interface ibongisamaki sambu na téléphone, kukondwa barre ya navigateur
ios_install_step1: Fina bouton ya Kokabola (carré na flèche ikeyi na zulu) na Safari
ios_install_step2: Kita mpe fina "Bakisa na Écran d'Accueil"
ios_install_step3: Fina "Bakisa" na coin ya zulu na diboko ya lubakala
ios_install_step4: Icône ya AFROLOC ekotala na écran na nge ya kubanda
click_to_install: Fina bouton yina izali na nse sambu na kutia
android_install_step1: Fina menu (points misatu) na coin ya zulu na diboko ya lubakala ya Chrome
android_install_step2: Sola "Bakisa na écran d'accueil" to "Tia appli"
android_install_step4: Icône ya AFROLOC ekotala na écran na nge ya kubanda
pwa_preview_note: PWA isalaka mbote mingi kana appli ibimisami. Na aperçu ya AFROLOC, makambu mankaka ikoki kuzala na ndelo.
install_after_publish: Sambu na kutia nsima ya kobimisa appli:
chrome_edge_install: Chrome/Edge: Icône ya kutia na barre ya adresse
publish_instructions: Fina bouton "Publish" na AFROLOC sambu na kubaka URL ya production. Na nsima baka URL wana mpe icône ya kutia ekotala automatique.
select_access_description: Sola mundu yaku ya kokota mu sistema
user_type_citizen_desc: Kiyandikisa kya AFROLOC kwa muntu mosi
hero_title: Sistema ya Mavila ma Dijitale ma Kontinenti
hero_description: Kimvuala kya dijitale kya moyo ye kya kosolola kwa muntu muena ye mavila ma Afrika, kosuekisa kubangana, kosambila ye kosambilana.
continental_system_badge: Sistema ya Mavila ma Dijitale ma Kontinenti
why_description: Makutu ya makutu ya bantu ya Afrika — mbala mosusu koleka 500 milhões — bena mavila ma oficiale ve
feature_addressing_desc: Kosolola mavila ye GPS yonso mu zinzo zina kuna nzila ya mazina ve
feature_validation_desc: Sistema ya ba-nsakudya ya ba-vazini ye ba-autoridade ya mavila
feature_financial_desc: Kokota mu ma-servisu ya banki, kreditu ye seguru
feature_verification_desc: Kotalula kya yonso mu masika 6-18 ku zona
feature_interoperability_desc: Kotalula ku ma-nsi ye ma-estrutura ya administrason
feature_apis_desc: Kobangana kya kwikala ye fintech, korreiu ye e-governo
step1_desc: Solola nzo yaku ye GPS mu app ya telefone. Sistema ivanda AFROLOC ya masika ku mavila yaku ye estrutura ya administrason.
step2_desc: Ba-vazini batatu ye autoridade ya mavila basolola nzo yaku. Kosolola kotalula ye SMS oyi ye kosina dijitale.
step3_desc: Kotambula kya yonso ye ma-notifikason ya masika (masika 6-18 ku zona). Mavila monso malemba ye masika.
cta_description: Bangana ye makutu ya bantu ya Afrika ye mavila ma dijitale ma kosolola
footer_copyright: © 2025 AFROLOC. Sistema ya Mavila ma Dijitale ma Kontinenti.
address_type_formal_desc: Mavila ye nkumbu ya nzila ye nimelu ya oficiale
address_type_informal_desc: Mavila kayina nkumbu ya nzila kanga nimelu ya oficiale
footer_proposal: Proposta kwa União Africana ye Smart Africa Alliance
login_description: Kota mu konta yaku ya kimvuala kya dijitale
phone_already_registered_desc: Numeru yayi ya telefone ikangana na konta kala.
use_login_instead: Telefone yayi yasonikwa kala. Kota nde.
invalid_credentials: Sola email ye senha yambote (minimu 6 karatere)
onboarding_description: Sola makwikilu yonso yena kubela yaku. Kima kiki kitututa kupersonalizar experiensa yaku.
purpose_identification_desc: Identifikason ya oficiali ye ma-dokumentu ya nzo
purpose_update_residence_desc: Atualizar mavila ya ma-rejistu yena kala
language_updated_desc: Lokota ibongwani mu ndenge ya nsi yosolola
basic_info_desc: Sola nsi yaku ye mavila ku kupersonalizar experiensa
location_permission_denied: Mvumo ya mavila yakanganyikile. Vhura GPS.
location_error: Mbutu mu kusolola mavila. Edza diaka.
gps_unavailable: GPS kena ve oyi izimiswa. Vhura GPS mu configurasões ye edza diaka.
gps_timeout: Tempo isila mu kusolola mavila. Tala nde GPS ikanguka ye edza diaka.
challenge_desc: Makutu ya makutu ya bantu ya Afrika — mbala mosusu koleka 500 milhões — bena mavila ma oficiale ve
challenge_step1_desc: Mu Kinshasa, Lagos, Luanda ye ma-cidade ya Afrika, makutu yikalanga mavila ma oficiale ve
challenge_step2_desc: Ma-ambulansa kafikanga ve, ma-karta kaukundanga ve, ma-entrega kasuekele ve
challenge_step3_desc: Ma-banki ya Afrika malonga komprovanti ya mavila mina bantu bangi bena ve
challenge_step4_desc: Kivandile kwa ye mu Afrika, kohumbula ma-kima ya ma-cidade ya ye
addressing_desc: Kosolola mavila ye GPS yonso mu zinzo zina kuna nzila ya mazina ve
addressing_step1_title: Kuna Nzila Ve? Kisalu Kena Ve!
addressing_step1_desc: Mu bairro ya Luanda oyi mu comuna ya Kinshasa, GPS iasolola nzo yaku
addressing_step2_desc: Yasuekisile ku ma-divisão ya nsi yonso: ma-província, ma-município, ma-setor, ma-bairro
addressing_step4_desc: Kosambila ye internet ya mbangu-mbangu, kima kye kyabele mu ma-cidade ya Afrika
validation_desc: Ma-autoridade ya administrason ya Afrika masolola ma-rejistu
validation_step1_desc: Musali ya administrason ya mavila iatula ma-quarteirão ye kosolola ba-kala
validation_step2_desc: Kotundikila 50-100 ma-rejistu ya bairro yonso kwa kosolola dibele
validation_step3_desc: Autoridade ya mavila iakanduka kimvula ye kosolola kima kya moyo
validation_step4_desc: Kokualuka ku município, província, kohumbula kimbangulu kya kotalula ya Afrika
financial_desc: Kokota mu ma-servisu ya banki, kreditu ye seguru mu Afrika
financial_step1_desc: BAI, BCI, Ecobank balongi AFROLOC kwa kovanda conta ya ba-komersante ya informal
financial_step2_desc: Ma-kooperativa ye IMF ya Afrika maueza kosolola ba-komersante ba cikuiku
financial_step3_desc: M-Pesa, Orange Money matalula ma-pagamento ya dijitale ku mavila ma fisiku
financial_step4_desc: Ma-seguradora ya Afrika maueza kosuma proteson ku bantu bana bena kokota ve
verification_desc: Atualizar yasuekisile ku kokua ya ma-cidade ya Afrika
verification_step1_desc: Luanda, Lagos, Kinshasa yaukua mbangu: kosolola mu masika 6
verification_step2_desc: Ma-zona ya ma-cidade yateleme: atualizar ya lumbu lyonso ikwete
verification_step3_desc: Notifikason mu ma-canal ya kopumbula mu Afrika mu masika ya kosolola
verification_step4_desc: Musali ya kimvula iatula oyi mukala iasolola mu posto ya administrason
interop_desc: Kotalula ku ma-nsi 54 ya Afrika ye ma-estrutura ya ye
interop_step1_desc: Padrão yatalule mu UA ialula Cairo ku Cape Town
interop_step2_desc: Nsi yonso iakanduka estrutura ye: wilaya, région, province, estado
interop_step3_desc: Kosuekisa komérsiu mu ma-komunidade ya ekonomia ya rejon ya Afrika
interop_step4_desc: ONU, Banco Mundial, DHL balongi AFROLOC kima mavila ma moyo
apis_desc: Kobangana ye ekosistema dijitale ya Afrika
apis_step1_desc: API REST ye ma-exemplo kwa ba-desenvolvedore ya Afrika kobangana kwikala
apis_step2_desc: Flutterwave, Paystack, Yoco masolola mavila mu tempo real
apis_step3_desc: E-commerce ya Afrika maueza kosuekisa ma-entrega ye mavila ma moyo
apis_step4_desc: Ma-ministério mabangana kwa sensu, saúde, educason ye ma-servisu ya social
process_geo_desc: Solola nzo yaku ye GPS mu app ya telefone
process_wit_desc: Ba-vazini batatu masolola nzo ye identidade yaku
process_val_desc: Ma-autoridade ya administrason ya mavila masolola nzo yaku
process_ver_desc: Kolongolola otomatiki mu ma-notifikason (masika 6-18 ku zona)
otp_sent_desc: Tala telefone yaku ye sola kodigo yotambule
invalid_phone_operator: Operadora yasolokele ve kwa nsi yayi
invalid_phone_number: Numeru ya telefone mbi ve. Sadila formato: +244912345678
phone_must_start_with_plus: Numeru ifwete kubanda na + ye kodigo ya nsi
max_attempts_exceeded: Makutu ya ma-tentativa masila. Longa kodigo ya mona.
phone_verification_required: Verifikason ya telefone ifwete kwa ma-rejistu yonso
2fa_description: Bakisa kibangu kya seguransa ku konta yaku
forgot_password_description: Sola email yaku ye tutinda link ya kubongisa senha yaku
reset_email_sent_description: Tala email yaku ye landa ma-instruson ya kubongisa senha yaku
didnt_receive_email: Wotambula email ve? Tala pasta ya spam oyi edza diaka.
password_too_short: Senha ifwete kuzala ye karatere 6 kaka
invalid_reset_link: Link ya kuvutula mbi ve oyi isila
view_manage_user_levels: Mona ye jerir ma-nivele ya mvumo ya basadisi mu sistema
complete_list_users: Lista yonso ya basadisi ye ma-nivele ya mvumo ya bena
logout_success_desc: Wabima mu konta yaku mu sambilu.
dashboard_welcome: Wezekele mu sistema ya mavila AFROLOC
quick_actions_desc: Banda mu kusonikilwa mavila AFROLOC yaku
manage_your_afroloc_addresses: Jerir mavila AFROLOC yaku mu kisika kimosi
add_first_address_description: Banda mu kubakisa mavila AFROLOC ya ntete kwa kutia identidade dijitale yaku
enter_new_phone_description: Sola numeru ya mona ya telefone kwa kutambula kodigo ya verifikason
enter_otp_description: Sola kodigo ya verifikason yatindilwe ku numeru yaku ya mona
change_phone_warning: Numeru ya telefone yaku yena identifikador nkuanikila yaku. Mavila AFROLOC yonso yamena ikangana na konta yaku.
include_country_code: Bakisa kodigo ya nsi (ex: +244 kwa Angola)
otp_sent_to_phone: Kodigo ya verifikason yatindilwe ku telefone yaku
phone_changed_successfully: Numeru ya telefone yabongisile mu sambilu
failed_to_send_otp: Kakusala ve kutinda kodigo ya verifikason
phone_is_primary_identifier: Numeru ya telefone yena identifikador nkuanikila ya konta yaku
phone_change_notification_sent: Notifikason ya seguransa yatindilwe ku ma-numeru ya kala ye ya mona
phone_change_notifications_info: Okotambula notifikason mu SMS ku ma-numeru ya kala ye ya mona, ye konfirmason mu email
phone_change_cooldown_message: Okoki kubongisa numeru yaku diaka mu {days} ma-lumbu. Kikangama kiayi kiproteja konta yaku kwa kubongisa kwa mvumo ve.
recent_activity_desc: Ma-pedido ya samba ya verifikason ya mavila
verify_new_identity_desc: Bandakesa processo ya verifikason ya mavila
biometric_unavailable: Biometria kena ve mu aparelu yayi
remove_biometric_description: Kiayi kilongola ma-kredensiale biometrika yaku yabombwe. Ofwete kokota ye email ye senha mu nima.
biometric_setup_instructions: Kwa kukangula autentifikason biometrika, kota ye email ye senha. Biometria ikonfigura otomatiki mu nima ya kokota ya ntete ya sambilu.
language_settings_description: Sola lokota ya kumonisa ya app
language_changed_description: Lokota ya interface yabongisile mu sambilu.
language_independent_note: Konfigurason yayi ikala ye nsi yosolola ve ye ikubela mu app yonso.
complete_profile_to_create: Sika profili yaku kwa kuvanda ma-rejistu AFROLOC.
create_first_afroloc: Vanda AFROLOC ya ntete yaku kwa kubanda na mavila dijitale
try_different_search: Edza kusosa ye ma-termo ya ndenge oyi bongisa ma-filtru
error_loading_report: Mbutu mu kukanga dados ya relatóriu
manage_phone_structures: Jerir estrutura ya numeru ya telefone ye roteamento OTP
configure_operator_otp: Konfigura operadora ya telecom kwa roteamento OTP
without_country_code: KENA kodigo ya nsi ve. Prefixu kaka
prefixes_note: Ma-prefixu mafwete kusonikilwa KENA kodigo ya nsi ve (ex: 923, 924, 925). Sistema ibakisa otomatiki kodigo ya nsi mu deteson.
add_operators_desc: Bakisa operadoras ya telecom kwa kukangula roteamento inteligente ya OTP basadu mu numeru ya telefone
delete_operator_confirm: Wena na certeza yolonga kulongola operadora yayi?
preallocate_numbers_desc: Pré-alokar ma-numeru lokali kwa validason OTP mu divisão administrativa
allocate_number_desc: Alokar numeru ya telefone kwa validason OTP mu zona spesifika
anti_fraud_desc: Ma-numeru yapré-alokadu mareduzir fraude mu kugarantir nde ma-khamada OTP ibima mu ma-numeru lokali yasosolole yaikangana na zona administrativa spesifika.
no_validation_numbers: Numeru ya validason kena ikonfigura ve
add_validation_numbers_desc: Bakisa ma-numeru ya telefone ya validason kwa kukangula verifikason OTP segura ye lokalisada
validation_number_updated: Numeru ya validason yabongisile mu sambilu
validation_number_added: Numeru ya validason yabakisile mu sambilu
validation_number_deleted: Numeru ya validason yalongolokele mu sambilu
delete_validation_number_confirm: Wena na certeza yolonga kulongola numeru ya validason yayi?
realtime_monitoring_desc: Monitor mu tempo real ya ma-evento ya seguransa
detected_events_history: Históriku ya ma-evento ya seguransa yasolokele

describe_actions_taken: Landula ma-ason yosala kwa kusolola evento yayi...
failed_to_load_security_data: Kakusala ve kukanga dados ya seguransa
gpsDiscrepancyDescription: Mavila ya aparelu makwisana ve ye mavila ya foto. Kiayi kimonisa manipulason.
country_configuration_desc: Konfigura ma-definison spesifika ya nsi yonso kwa sistema AFROLOC

error_sending_email: Mbutu mu kutinda email ya alerta
search_fraud_flags: Sosa ma-flag mu dizina, telefone oyi kodigo...
resolve_fraud_flag_description: Bakisa ma-nota ya resoluson ya alerta ya fraude yayi
fraud_flag_resolved: Flag ya fraude yasolokele mu sambilu
error_resolving_flag: Mbutu mu kusolola flag ya fraude
admin_only_access: Ma-nkuluntu kaka bakoki kokota paji yayi
quick_login_available: Kokota mbangu ikala kwa aparelu yayi
verification_cycle_frequency: Ntangu yena na {score} mfumu ya ngolo
days_remaining_in_cycle: lumbu {days} ke sala na ntangu yayi
address_update_description: Tondisa bisika na nsi soki nzela na nge ezwi nkombo ya ofisiel to nzo na nge ezwi nimero oyo gouvernement ya esika epesi. Système ekobongola motango ya adresse kofanda informel kokómela formel.
official_name_by_admin: Nkombo ya ofisiel oyo gouvernement epesi
official_number_by_admin: Nimero ya ofisiel oyo gouvernement epesi
address_type_explanation: Sima ya kotondisa nkombo ya nzela MOKO nimero, adresse ekozala na motango ya Formel. Soki te, ekozala Informel. Adresse ekozala Numérique kaka sima ya certification na ba autorités.
delete_address_warning: Ondimi nde okolongola adresse oyo ya AFROLOC? Likambo oyo ekoki kozonga te.
mitigation_add_house_number: Bakisa numero ya nzo mpo na kokitisa ngolo
mitigation_digital_frequent_verification: Adresse ya numérique esengeli kuzaba mingi
mitigation_property_monitoring: Ndenge ya propriété oyo esengeli kolandela mingi
mitigation_gps_required: Coordonnées GPS esengeli mpo na kokitisa ngolo
mitigation_add_more_witnesses: Bakisa bantemwe mingi mpo na kolendisa kuzaba
mitigation_add_witnesses: Bakisa bantemwe mpo na kuzaba ya communauté
mitigation_improve_ats: Bobongisa score ATS na kuzaba mingi
mitigation_low_ats: Score ATS ezali moke - kuzaba mingi esengeli
mitigation_over_1_year: Kuzaba ya lombangu - ya nsuka eleki mvula 1
mitigation_never_verified: Adresse ezabami te nsima ya enregistrement
witnesses_required_message: Osengeli na bantemwe {count} bakondimami mpo na kokondima AFROLOC na nge
witness_contract_legal_note: Motemwe oyo asigné kontrat légal konfirmant ete ayebi muntu mpe avérifie exactitude ya informations ya adresse. Signature ezali na valeur légale.
waiting_for_witness_confirmation: Tozeli motemwe akondima mpe asigner kontrat
once_witnesses_confirm_authority_validat: Soki bantemwe bakondima, mokonzi akoki kokondima AFROLOC na nge
upload_manage_documents_desc: Télécharger mpe gérer mikanda na nge ya kondimama ya kimvuala
upload_documents_to_verify: Télécharger mikanda ya kimvuala mpo na kokondima AFROLOC na nge
quick_action_verify_desc: Okotindama po obanda mosala ya vérification ya adresse ya mpa ya AFROLOC.
quick_action_report_desc: Okotindama na esika ya kosala mpe kotala ba rapports ya misala.
quick_action_users_desc: Okotindama na esika ya kukamba basaleli ya système.
no_record_found_desc: Adresse oyo ozali koluka yimonikaka te to yizali te. Tala identifiant mpe meka diaka, to vutuka na liste ya ba adresses.
no_reports_desc: Vérification mosi te yikomamaka na eleko oyo yiponama. Bobongola eleko ya analyse to zela ba vérifications ya mpa yisalama.
no_users_found_desc: Mosaleli mosi te akokani na ba critères ya recherche. Meka kobongola ba filtres to recherche na nge.
